**Quarterly risk-register review** — see `governance/risk-register.md`.

- [ ] Re-score existing risks (likelihood × impact); update status
- [ ] Add new risks from incidents, pen-test findings, and changes since last review
- [ ] Confirm each "Controlled" risk still maps to a working control (CI gate / policy)
- [ ] Reassign owners / due dates for open mitigations
- [ ] Commit the updated register (the diff is the evidence)

**Reviewer:** _____  **Date:** _____  **New/closed risks:** _____
